1→"""Linear pipeline for PR submission. 2→ 3→Replaces the dual-path branching orchestration with a sequence of plain 4→functions transforming a frozen SubmitState dataclass. 5→ 6→Each step: (ErkContext, SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError 7→""" 8→ 9→import concurrent.futures 10→import dataclasses 11→import sys 12→import uuid 13→from collections.abc import Callable 14→from dataclasses import dataclass 15→from functools import cache 16→from pathlib import Path 17→ 18→import click 19→ 20→from erk.cli.commands.pr.shared import ( 21→ assemble_pr_body, 22→ echo_plan_context_status, 23→ maybe_advance_lifecycle_to_impl, 24→ recover_plan_header, 25→ run_commit_message_generation, 26→) 27→from erk.cli.constants import ERK_PR_LABEL, PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX 28→from erk.cli.ensure import UserFacingCliError 29→from erk.cli.repo_resolution import get_remote_github 30→from erk.core.commit_message_generator import CommitMessageGenerator
... [1101 lines omitted] ...
34→from erk_shared.gateway.git.remote_ops.types import PullRebaseError, PushError 120→class SubmitError: 121→ """Error result from a pipeline step.""" 124→ error_type: str 133→SubmitStep = Callable[[ErkContext, SubmitState], SubmitState | SubmitError] 136→def prepare_state(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError: 149→ return SubmitError( 151→ error_type="no_branch", 165→ except ValueError as e: 166→ return SubmitError( 168→ error_type="issue_linkage_mismatch", 211→def cleanup_impl_for_submit(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError: 231→def commit_wip(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError: 241→def capture_existing_pr_body(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError: 253→def push_and_create_pr(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError: 270→def _graphite_first_flow(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError: 277→ # but the first submit attempt failed before pushing. 299→ return SubmitError( 301→ error_type="remote_diverged", 331→ except RuntimeError as e: 332→ error_str = str(e) 333→ if "restack" in error_str.lower(): 334→ return SubmitError( 336→ error_type="graphite_restack_required", 345→ return SubmitError( 347→ error_type="graphite_submit_failed", 348→ message=f"Graphite submit failed: {e}", 360→ return SubmitError( 362→ error_type="pr_not_found", 391→def _core_submit_flow(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError: 399→ return SubmitError( 401→ error_type="github_auth_failed", 411→ return SubmitError( 413→ error_type="no_commits", 431→ if isinstance(pull_result, PullRebaseError): 432→ return SubmitError( 434→ error_type="rebase_failed", 436→ f"Failed to rebase '{state.branch_name}' on origin.

Excellent! I have successfully completed the renaming task.
## Summary
I have renamed all occurrences of `plan_backend` to `pr_backend` and `require_plan_backend` to `require_pr_backend` in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py`.
**Changes made:** - **Line 627**: Renamed parameter `plan_backend=ctx.plan_backend` to `pr_backend=ctx.pr_backend` in the `PrContextProvider` instantiation within the `fetch_plan_context()` function
**Verification:** - The file contained one occurrence of `plan_backend` which has been successfully renamed - No occurrences of `require_plan_backend` were found in this file - A final grep confirms no old naming remains in the file
The changes preserve all user-facing string messages and comments, as requested.
